translated: And that wraps up our card illustration segment.
[CORNER: Song Watchalong] Next, we're going to talk about the new song written for this event by Onuma Parsley,
"Envy Baby," while we watch the 3DMV together.
But before we watch the 3DMV, I actually have a comment
from the Sega 3DMV production team to share with you all.
"In the 3DMV for 'Envy Baby,' we used the visual of falling underwater to represent Mizuki's wavering emotions and the feelings they can't quite express to the other members."
"We utilized the insert feature and dedicated a lot of time to the underwater falling sequence,
going through a lot of trial and error to get the expression just right."
"While we still face challenges in fully depicting a character's inner psyche,
we hope you enjoy this new style of expression through Mizuki."
That's what they had to say.
